summary: Addresses all 3 external review comments from greptile-apps[bot]: (1) Added leader_ca_cert_file to all 3 Raft retry_join stanzas, fixing broken cluster formation with self-signed TLS certs. (2) Added TODO(CC-0009) documenting root token /proc/<pid>/cmdline exposure, deferred per reviewer agreement. (3) Added token_max_ttl=4h to ESO Kubernetes auth roles, matching AppRole provisioner ceiling. Review pattern files updated with accurate occurrence counts and new TLS trust chain pattern.

tests_checklist.item: V2: Type checking passes (N/A — no typed code changed)
V3: Lint passes (N/A — no lintable code changed)

code_quality_checklist.item: Q1: Functions do one thing — bao_exec, bao_exec_stdin unchanged
Q3: No code duplication — leader_ca_cert_file applied consistently to all 3 stanzas
Q4: Clear naming — token_max_ttl is self-documenting
P5: File locations match project structure conventions

security_checklist.item: S3: No hardcoded secrets in changed files
S5: Sensitive data exposure in logs documented with TODO for BAO_TOKEN /proc exposure
leader_ca_cert_file correctly references /openbao/tls/ca.crt matching volumeMount at /openbao/tls
token_max_ttl=4h applied to ESO roles matches AppRole provisioner ceiling — consistent bounded lifetime

architecture_checklist.item: Raft TLS trust chain complete — self-signed CA cert referenced in all retry_join stanzas
FluxCD HelmRelease pattern preserved (interval 30m, CRD settings, dependsOn)
Changes are minimal and directly address external review feedback — no scope creep

dry_yagni_checklist.item: No future-proofing beyond what was requested

fail_fast_checklist.item: BAO_TOKEN still fails fast with :? parameter expansion

defensive_checklist.item: TLS verification properly configured for Raft inter-node communication
Token lifetimes bounded — no indefinite renewal possible

suggested_improvements: The root token /proc/<pid>/cmdline exposure (TODO in common.sh:31-34) should be addressed in a future hardening feature. Consider injecting the token via a tmpfs-mounted file inside the pod, read from the openbao-unseal-keys Secret.
next_steps: Merge this PR after approval — all external review feedback has been addressed
Track the BAO_TOKEN hardening TODO(CC-0009) in a follow-up feature for production readiness

metadata.title: D002: Implement OpenBao deployment and secret management
